summary: All tool tests fail at runtime with environment-level Effect/Drizzle issues — pre-existing, not specific to telemetry test
detail: Three distinct runtime failure modes observed across tool tests: (1) tool-telemetry.test.ts fails with Effect Pipeable.js args[1] is not a function, (2) external-directory.test.ts fails with Drizzle .get() not a function, (3) failure-tools.test.ts fails with Service not found: @opencode/ToolCache. All failures originate from infrastructure-level issues in the environment (Effect layer wiring, Drizzle version mismatch, missing service layers). None are caused by test file content.
